g.text: Tiered PR Review: Flow and Gates
Classify PR into one of five classes:
scripts/ writes via gh api, secrets, transfer/delete;
renovate tag/SHA mismatch or major bump;
Fork PRs cannot read the API-key
secret, so the job would only fail
a skipped or failed Tier 0 job
PR remains gated only by the
static layer plus raw bot comments
Tier 0 is advisory only: its verdict is a
sticky comment plus a label, never a merge
judgment" is the catch-all sixth trigger.
patch/minor pin bumps do not escalate
